A

acceptCoOrganizerInvite(String, String) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.entrant.EntrantNotificationActivity.NotificationAdapter
Accepts an invitation to become a co-organizer for an event.
acceptLotteryInvite(String, String) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.entrant.EntrantNotificationActivity.NotificationAdapter
Accepts a lottery invitation by updating the user's status in the event's waiting list to "Enrolled", and deletes the notification.
acceptPrivateInvite(String, String) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.entrant.EntrantNotificationActivity.NotificationAdapter
Accepts a private invitation to an event, updating the user's status from Pending to Waitlist in Firestore, and removes the notification.

applyFiltersAndSearch(String) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.event.EventListActivity
